name: winmcpshim
description: Fast native Windows file, text, and command utilities.
long_description: WinMcpShim is an MCP server for Windows providing a complete set of file, directory, and text utilities (cat, grep, head, tail, diff, edit, tree, etc.) plus an allowlisted shell runner. Implemented as a single statically-linked Go binary with no runtime dependencies. Benchmarks show ~7.8 times faster cold start and ~22.9 times faster single-file grep than Python/Node reference MCP servers. Developed to DO-178C avionics practices: 503 tests, 88% merged coverage, integration tests against adversarial child processes (pipe flooding, crashes, grandchild spawning), TOCTOU-hardened path confinement via GetFinalPathNameByHandle, and an explicit allowlist for the run tool.

allowed_roots.title: Allowed root directories
allowed_roots.description: Directories WinMcpShim is permitted to read or write under, and from which the run tool may execute any file. All file operations outside these roots are rejected; symlink and NTFS-junction escapes are detected. ⚠ MAKE SURE NOT TO LEAVE EMPTY ENTRIES IN THIS LIST — typing a path and clicking Add adds both the path AND a blank row; remove the blank row before saving or the extension will fail to start.

allowed_commands.title: Allowed executables for the run tool (optional)
allowed_commands.description: Pick each .exe the run tool is permitted to invoke. Selections are matched by absolute path at call time. Executables inside the allowed root directories are always permitted regardless of this list. ⚠ MAKE SURE NOT TO LEAVE EMPTY ENTRIES IN THIS LIST — typing and clicking Add adds both the value AND a blank row; remove the blank row before saving or the extension will fail to start.

max_timeout.title: Maximum tool-call timeout (seconds)
max_timeout.description: Upper bound on per-tool-call timeouts that Claude can request (1 to 600). Affects the run tool and external tools.

tools.name: cat
tools.description: Read one or more files in a single call.

tools.name: copy
tools.description: Copy a file or directory tree.

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a single file or empty directory.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Compare two text files and show unified diff.

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Find-and-replace a unique string in a file.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search inside file contents by regex (Go RE2).

tools.name: head
tools.description: Show the first N lines of a file.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List one directory level with optional glob filter.

tools.name: mkdir
tools.description: Create a directory and any missing parents.

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read a single text file with optional offset/limit.

tools.name: roots
tools.description: Return the list of allowed root directories.

tools.name: run
tools.description: Execute a command restricted by an allowlist or directory confinement.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Recursively find files by name glob.

tools.name: tail
tools.description: Show the last N lines of a file.

tools.name: wc
tools.description: Count lines, words, and bytes in a text file.

tools.name: write
tools.description: Create or overwrite a text file atomically.
